title: sorghum bicolor var. rotundulum
intro: Sorghum bicolor var. rotundulum, commonly known as broom sorghum, is a plant species that belongs to the sorghum genus and is characterized by its round panicles and slender stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of broom sorghum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
